Offline Conversions: Intro & Setup
Offline Conversions
Offline Conversions were designed for brick and mortar stores to link non
website sales to ads run through Facebook.
Fast-forward many years and this is now allowing us to link untracked online
sales back to our ad account.
Why is this important?
I'll explain in more detail further into the training but mainly it's because:
1. You can capture sales MISSED by browser and server (CAPI) pixels
2. You can look at breakdown data for Offline conversions
3. You can capture data outside of the pixel's 7-day tracking period
4. You can see iOS14.x+ sales not captured by the pixel
Watch the video on what to do to ensure this is set up and working and later on
I'll show how powerful this can be for your business.
Additional links for advice and insights:
1. Using the Offline Conversions API (different from the Conversion API)
2. Creating offline data
3. Cheatcode - using Zapier to push sales data back into Facebook (regardless of
your sales platform whether its Shopify, Clickfunnels or anything else)
4. Viewing offline data
5. Further reading
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
